2605.06554.title: Long Context Pre-Training with Lighthouse Attention
2605.06554.paper_summary: Training causal transformers at extreme sequence lengths is bottlenecked by the quadratic time and memory of scaled dot-product attention (SDPA). In this work, we propose Lighthouse Attention, a training-only symmetrical selection-based hierarchical attention algorithm that wraps around ordinary SDPA and can be easily removed towards the end of the training. Our hierarchical selection is also gradient-free, which exempts us from dealing with a complicated and potentially inefficient backward pass kernel. Our contribution is three-fold: (i) A subquadratic hierarchical pre- and post-processing step that does adaptive compression and decompression of the sequence. (ii) A symmetrical compression strategy that pools queries, keys and values at the same time, while preserving left-to-right causality, which greatly improves parallelism. (iii) A two stage training approach which we pre-train for the majority of the time with Lighthouse Attention and recover a full attention model at the end with a short training. We run preliminary small scale LLM pre-training experiments that show the effectiveness of our method compared to full attention training with all other settings matched, where we achieve a faster total training time and lower final loss after the recovery phase. Full code is available at: https://github.com/ighoshsubho/lighthouse-attention
2605.06554.paper_summary_zh: 訓練極長序列的因果Transformer受到縮放點積注意力（SDPA）所需的平方時間和記憶體的瓶頸。在這項工作中，我們提出了燈塔注意力，一種僅用於訓練的對稱選擇基層次注意力算法，它包裹在普通的SDPA周圍，並且可以在訓練結束時輕鬆移除。我們的層次選擇也是無梯度的，這使我們免於處理複雜且可能低效的反向傳遞內核。我們的貢獻有三個方面：（i）一個亞平方的層次前處理和後處理步驟，對序列進行自適應壓縮和解壓縮。（ii）一種對稱壓縮策略，同時對查詢、鍵和值進行池化，同時保持從左到右的因果性，這大大提高了並行性。（iii）一種兩階段的訓練方法，我們大部分時間使用燈塔注意力進行預訓練，並在結束時通過短時間訓練恢復完整的注意力模型。我們進行了初步的小規模LLM預訓練實驗，顯示我們的方法相對於全注意力訓練的有效性，所有其他設置均匹配，在恢復階段後我們實現了更快的總訓練時間和較低的最終損失。完整的代碼可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/ighoshsubho/lighthouse-attention
2605.06554.author: Bowen Peng et.al.
2605.06554.authors: Bowen Peng, Subho Ghosh, Jeffrey Quesnelle
